metadata.description: Automated PR review loop. Cursor (or Copilot / Codex) reviews, Claude fixes, iterate until merge-ready.

plugins.name: pr-autopilot
plugins.description: Open a PR, run /loop /pr-autopilot-step <PR#>, walk away. Enabled reviewers review (default: Cursor each iter + Copilot final-only). Claude reads each review and either fixes or pushes back with reasoning, pushes, waits for re-review. Exits when all per-iter reviewers report success (with 10 independent safety stops). Optionally pings @copilot for a final sanity check.
